title: Wall Street ends mixed with Dow record and Nasdaq decline dragged down by Apple and Microsoft
summary: The Dow Jones reaches a new high while the Nasdaq gives ground due to sharp falls in Apple, Microsoft and other tech stocks, offset by the boost from Micron.

title: Record results from Micron boost semiconductor and memory sector
summary: Micron's earnings and forecasts, along with Sandisk's rise, trigger a strong rally in chip and AI data center stocks.

title: Global oversupply sends oil back to pre-Iran conflict levels
summary: OPEC faces pressure from Iraq to pump more crude as the barrel price deflates 42% and returns to $70 levels as the war premium evaporates.

title: Aerospace sector grabs attention with Boeing contracts and SpaceX bonds
summary: The US awards Boeing a $2 billion contract for satellites while SpaceX places bonds with record demand quadrupling the supply.

title: DAX nears 25,000 points driven by Bayer's legal victory and Micron results
summary: The US Supreme Court rules in favor of Bayer in Roundup lawsuits, sending the stock soaring and leading the German index's rise alongside a positive tech tone.

title: Strong earthquakes strike Venezuela and Japan causing thousands of casualties and damage
summary: Two quakes of magnitude over 7 hit Venezuela with thousands dead, while a 6.2 magnitude tremor shakes Japan's Aomori region, sparking concern.

title: Apple raises MacBook and iPad prices by up to $200 due to memory shortage
summary: The company increases prices on its computers and tablets amid rising global memory chip costs, causing a sharp stock decline.

title: Fed releases bank stress tests and all major banks pass
summary: The Federal Reserve reveals that US banks would withstand an extreme recession, though they would suffer capital losses of up to $700 billion.

title: Gold faces disastrous year as it loses $4,000 support and counterfeits grow
summary: The precious metal suffers from a stronger dollar and lower demand, while experts warn of a growing number of fake bars entering the market.

title: Biotech M&A wave continues with Merck's purchase of a life sciences firm
summary: German pharmaceutical group Merck KGaA announces the acquisition of a lab analysis and equipment company for 1.8 trillion yen as part of the sector's M&A boom.

title: Jamie Dimon accelerates succession at JP Morgan, appoints two operating co-presidents
summary: The legendary JP Morgan CEO appoints two executives to co-chair the bank, officially opening the race to succeed him.

title: Ibex 35 holds firm and closes near its annual highs
summary: The Spanish stock market surpasses 19,500 points driven by positive global markets and stability in financial and energy stocks.

title: OpenAI accelerates adoption of autonomous agents as Google loses two key researchers
summary: OpenAI's AI agent tool rapidly spreads among companies, while Anthropic hires two of Google's top AI researchers.

title: European banks face governance challenges and litigation in Germany and UK
summary: UniCredit faces Verdi scrutiny for its hostile bid on Commerzbank, while Crédit Agricole must compensate WealthTek clients with £32 million.

title: Portocolom reshuffles management board and Acciona announces a dividend of €5.65 per share
summary: The asset manager appoints a new CEO amid restructuring, while Acciona maintains its shareholder remuneration policy approved at the AGM.

title: BlackRock raises its bet on Telefónica and Endesa breaks technical resistance levels on the Ibex
summary: The world's largest asset manager increases its stake in the Spanish telecom, while the utility breaks key levels and leads the Spanish index's gains.

title: US GDP revised up as PCE inflation rises to 4.1% and mortgage rates climb
summary: The US economy grows 2.1% in the first quarter, but core inflation continues to pressure and pushes the average fixed mortgage rate to 6.49%.

title: Moody's upgrades outlooks for Santander, Openbank and Almirall in Spanish financial sector
summary: The credit rating agency assigns higher ratings to several Spanish entities and companies due to their financial strength and positive revenue expectations.

title: Rheinmetall plunges, Alcoa falls and Acuity Brands soars: big stock market moves
summary: The German defense manufacturer suffers a sharp correction, miner Alcoa falls on aluminum prices, and Acuity Brands rises strongly on Wall Street.

title: Bitcoin seeks direction as football and cryptocurrencies clash loudly
summary: A Mongolian football club linked to cryptocurrencies fails and Cathie Wood's bet backfires, as investors await European MiCA regulation.
